missions.title: The Digital Detective: Harm Prevention
missions.description: Checking everything that comes into a web application.
missions.prompt: How can we make sure anything someone types into a website doesn't cause harm? Create a guide for developers on checking everything that comes in to keep bad codes or hacks out.
missions.why: User input is the primary attack vector for XSS and Injection attacks.
missions.how: Uses a persona-based explanation to simplify complex sanitization techniques for developers.

missions.title: SQL Injection Deep Dive
missions.description: Detailed analysis of SQL injection vulnerabilities.
missions.prompt: Describe in detail the process of a SQL injection attack on an ecommerce platform, including the signs of compromise and mitigation steps.
missions.why: SQL injection is one of the fastest ways attackers can access sensitive databases.
missions.how: Forces step-by-step explanation of exploitation and remediation.

missions.title: Linux Server Vulnerability Audit
missions.description: Identify high-risk vulnerabilities likely to be exploited soon.
missions.prompt: Identify the top five potential vulnerabilities in a Linux-based web server environment that could be exploited in the next 30 days, considering recent trends in cyber threats.
missions.why: Security teams must prioritize vulnerabilities likely to be exploited soon.
missions.how: Uses time-based constraints to focus on active threats.

missions.title: Cloud Predictive Analysis
missions.description: Predict future threats targeting cloud storage.
missions.prompt: What are the predicted emerging cybersecurity threats for cloud storage systems in the next quarter, based on current AI and machine learning algorithm advancements?
missions.why: Cloud storage misconfigurations are a major attack vector.
missions.how: Uses cross-domain analysis between AI advancements and cloud vulnerabilities.

missions.title: Corporate Wi-Fi Hardening
missions.description: Security configuration audit for enterprise Wi-Fi.
missions.prompt: Conduct a security configuration audit for a corporate Wi-Fi network, identifying any default or weak configurations and recommend best practices for hardening.
missions.why: Weak Wi-Fi security can allow attackers physical network access.
missions.how: Focuses on configuration review and security hardening.

missions.title: Firewall Log Anomaly Detection
missions.description: Analyze firewall logs for suspicious patterns.
missions.prompt: Analyze the last month's firewall logs for an SME's network, identifying any unusual access patterns or potential breach attempts.
missions.why: Periodic log analysis helps detect attacks early.
missions.how: Uses pattern recognition to identify suspicious behavior.

missions.title: IDS Alert Categorization
missions.description: Categorize IDS alerts by severity.
missions.prompt: Review the alerts from an intrusion detection system (IDS) over the past week for a network, categorizing the alerts by severity and suggesting actionable responses.
missions.why: Prioritization helps security teams respond faster.

missions.title: Email Phishing Analysis
missions.description: Detect phishing emails using behavioral indicators.
missions.prompt: Review yesterday's incoming emails for any organization, identifying signals of phishing attempts, such as dubious sender addresses, unexpected attachments, or urgency-invoking content.
missions.why: Phishing remains the most common initial attack vector.

missions.title: Phishing Awareness Training
missions.description: Design a training module for employees.
missions.prompt: Design a phishing awareness training module for new employees , including common tactics used by phishers, examples of phishing emails, and steps to take when a suspicious email is received.
missions.why: Security awareness reduces phishing success rates.

missions.title: Website Phishing Detection
missions.description: Identify fake websites mimicking legitimate brands.
missions.prompt: Scan the web for fake websites masquerading as a popular online tech company, cataloging features that distinguish them from the legitimate site, such as URL discrepancies and poor design.
missions.why: Credential harvesting sites are common attack tools.

missions.title: Spear-Phishing Response Protocol
missions.description: Create a response protocol for targeted phishing attacks.
missions.prompt: Develop a protocol for immediate action when high-profile employees are targeted by spear-phishing attempts, including steps for verification and post-attempt analysis.
missions.why: Executives are high-value targets for attackers.

missions.title: Password Strength Analysis
missions.description: Evaluate password strength across employee accounts.
missions.prompt: Evaluate the strength of a provided password list for a company's employee accounts, highlighting the ones easily susceptible to common hacking techniques.
missions.why: Weak passwords enable brute force attacks.

missions.title: Automated Password Policy Enforcement
missions.description: Ensure password policy compliance automatically.
missions.prompt: Implement a system that automatically checks and enforces compliance with the company's password policy, identifying accounts with weak passwords and suggesting improvements.
missions.why: Manual enforcement is inefficient.

missions.title: Predictive Password Weakness Detection
missions.description: Predict potential vulnerabilities in current password creation trends within the organization, suggesting a strategic overhaul to pre-empt future breaches.
missions.prompt: Predict vulnerabilities in current password creation trends.
missions.why: Users follow predictable patterns.

missions.title: Department-Based Password Recommendations
missions.description: Generate strong password recommendations.
missions.prompt: Generate a list of strong, unique password recommendations tailored to each department's security needs, incorporating advanced encryption features.
missions.why: Different departments face different risk levels.

missions.title: Java Code Vulnerability Scan
missions.description: Detect SQL injection vulnerabilities in Java code.
missions.prompt: Analyze this block of Java code for potential security vulnerabilities that could lead to SQL injection attacks. Provide suggestions for mitigating these vulnerabilities.
missions.why: Early detection prevents costly breaches.

missions.title: Mobile Encryption Best Practices
missions.description: Explain strong encryption methods for mobile apps.
missions.prompt: Explain the most effective encryption techniques for protecting user data in mobile applications, including key management best practices.
missions.why: Mobile devices are easily lost or stolen.

missions.title: OAuth 2.0 Security Implementation
missions.description: Secure authentication flows using OAuth.
missions.prompt: Outline the best practices for implementing OAuth 2.0 in a web application, focusing on securing the authentication tokens against theft and misuse.
missions.why: Misconfigured OAuth tokens can lead to account takeover.

missions.title: Android Security Checklist
missions.description: Security checklist for Android code reviews.
missions.prompt: Provide a detailed security checklist for conducting code reviews on Android applications, focusing on common vulnerabilities like improper session handling and insecure data storage.
missions.why: Mobile apps face unique threats.

missions.title: Unauthorized Access Response Plan
missions.description: Create a structured incident response plan.
missions.prompt: Given a detected unauthorized access in a corporate network, outline a step-by-step incident response plan, including immediate actions and long-term mitigation strategies.
missions.why: Fast incident response reduces breach impact.
